mapper.select: SELECT k.id, k.name, k.api_key AS apiKey, k.is_enabled AS isEnabled, k.expired_at AS expiredAt, k.max_amount AS maxAmount, COALESCE(u.total_requests, 0) AS totalRequests, COALESCE(u.success_requests, 0) AS successRequests, COALESCE(u.total_input_tokens, 0) AS totalInputTokens, COALESCE(u.total_output_tokens, 0) AS totalOutputTokens, COALESCE(u.total_cost, 0) AS totalCost FROM api_keys k LEFT JOIN ( SELECT api_key, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(status) = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_requests, SUM(COALESCE(input_tokens, 0)) AS total_input_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(output_tokens, 0)) AS total_output_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(cost, 0)) AS total_cost FROM request_logs WHERE api_key IS NOT NULL AND api_key != '' GROUP BY api_key ) u ON k.api_key = u.api_key ORDER BY k.id

SELECT k.id, k.name, k.api_key AS apiKey, k.is_enabled AS isEnabled, k.expired_at AS expiredAt, k.max_amount AS maxAmount, COALESCE(u.total_requests, 0) AS totalRequests, COALESCE(u.success_requests, 0) AS successRequests, COALESCE(u.total_input_tokens, 0) AS totalInputTokens, COALESCE(u.total_output_tokens, 0) AS totalOutputTokens, COALESCE(u.total_cost, 0) AS totalCost FROM api_keys k LEFT JOIN ( SELECT api_key, COUNT(*) AS total_requests, SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(status) = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_requests, SUM(COALESCE(input_tokens, 0)) AS total_input_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(output_tokens, 0)) AS total_output_tokens, SUM(COALESCE(cost, 0)) AS total_cost FROM request_logs WHERE api_key IS NOT NULL AND api_key != '' GROUP BY api_key ) u ON k.api_key = u.api_key ORDER BY k.id

SELECT k.id, k.name, k.api_key AS apiKey, k.is_enabled AS isEnabled, k.expired_at AS expiredAt, k.max_amount AS maxAmount, COALESCE(COUNT(r.id), 0) AS totalRequests, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(r.status) = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successRequests, COALESCE(SUM(r.input_tokens), 0) AS totalInputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(r.output_tokens), 0) AS totalOutputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(r.cost), 0) AS totalCost FROM api_keys k LEFT JOIN request_logs r ON k.api_key = r.api_key WHERE k.api_key = #{apiKey} GROUP BY k.id, k.name, k.api_key, k.is_enabled, k.expired_at, k.max_amount

SELECT k.id, k.name, k.api_key AS apiKey, k.is_enabled AS isEnabled, k.expired_at AS expiredAt, k.max_amount AS maxAmount, COALESCE(COUNT(r.id), 0) AS totalRequests, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(r.status) = 'SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS successRequests, COALESCE(SUM(r.input_tokens), 0) AS totalInputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(r.output_tokens), 0) AS totalOutputTokens, COALESCE(SUM(r.cost), 0) AS totalCost FROM api_keys k LEFT JOIN request_logs r ON k.api_key = r.api_key WHERE k.api_key = #{apiKey} GROUP BY k.id, k.name, k.api_key, k.is_enabled, k.expired_at, k.max_amount
